## Codex checklist
*Codex must verify every item before opening this PR*

### Correctness
- [ ] Output matches schema defined in `core/contracts/schemas.py`
- [ ] No logic added to forbidden files
  (`agent_execution.py`, `broker_adapter.py`, `order_builder.py`,
   `fills.py`, `risk_policy.json`, `portfolio_policy.json`)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, API keys, or absolute file paths
- [ ] No `print()` statements — logger used throughout
- [ ] No bare `except:` or silent exception swallowing

### Tests
- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/ -v --tb=short` passes with zero failures
- [ ] New public functions have at least one unit test each
- [ ] Tests cover: happy path, empty input, missing columns, NaN input
- [ ] No live API calls in unit tests — fixtures used from `data/sample/`

### Code quality
- [ ] All new public functions have type hints
- [ ] All new public functions have a docstring
- [ ] Imports ordered: stdlib → third-party → internal
- [ ] No unused imports

### Project hygiene  
- [ ] Branch named `codex/<issue-number>-<slug>` or `feature/<slug>`
- [ ] Issue label updated to `review`
- [ ] No unrelated files modified
- [ ] `requirements.txt` updated if new packages added (noted below)
